title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 29 - 2017: Buildings of Rome Book.

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog updating his progress on a personal project cataloging the buildings of Rome, including organizing them alphabetically and by building type using a Wikipedia list. He also discusses plans to use Google Earth to map Rome and mentions having his computer read a 'Buildings of Rome' book aloud to him while he works.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: highly motivated to pursue it but must finish prerequisite cataloging work first

stances.topic: organizing building list by type vs. alphabetically
stances.position: wishes he had planned the type-based organization earlier but is adapting using a Wikipedia list

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He worked until he got too tired on June 29th, 2017.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He worked until around 4:30 AM on June 29th, 2017.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He got up at 9:30 AM on June 30th, 2017.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was working on organizing a menu alphabetically and by types of buildings.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He copied a list of buildings and their dimensions from Wikipedia to use as a menu.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to fill in the menu with as many buildings as possible, including those from 1945.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is motivated to work on Google Earth Rome but needs to finish organizing the rows first.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to trace soldiers and increase their numbers from 40,000 to 160,000 for battles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had his computer read the book 'The Buildings of Rome' to him.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is watching Board G and working on characters related to it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is planning to create videos about the buildings around Rome.
